---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-06-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# =============================================================
# RANGER - ESCENARI 50% - CERCA D'HIPERPARÀMETRES
# =============================================================

setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")

load("dades_escenari_50_corrAleat.RData")

library(ranger)
library(caret)
library(futurize)
library(progressify)
library(dplyr)

# -------------------------------------------------------------
# PARAL·LELITZACIÓ
# -------------------------------------------------------------
plan(multisession, workers = 12)

# -------------------------------------------------------------
# GRAELLA D'HIPERPARÀMETRES
# -------------------------------------------------------------
hiper <- expand.grid(
  num.trees  = c(500, 1000),
  mtry_tipus = c("sqrt", "p/3", "p/2"),
  llindar    = c("zero", "mediana", "mean_sd"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cat(sprintf("Total combinacions hiperparàmetres: %d\n", nrow(hiper)))
cat(sprintf("Total escenaris (N x pi x cor):     %d\n", nrow(comb)))
cat(sprintf("Total forests a entrenar:            %d\n",
            nrow(hiper) * nrow(comb) * iters))

# -------------------------------------------------------------
# FUNCIÓ D'UNA ITERACIÓ
# -------------------------------------------------------------
una_iteracio_50 <- function(j, X_esc, Y_esc, num_vars, num_sig,
                             num.trees, mtry_tipus, llindar) {

  library(ranger)

  X_df  <- as.data.frame(X_esc[[j]])
  colnames(X_df) <- paste0("V", seq_len(ncol(X_df)))
  y_fac <- as.factor(Y_esc[[j]])
  p     <- ncol(X_df)

  mtry_val <- switch(mtry_tipus,
    "sqrt" = floor(sqrt(p)),
    "p/3"  = floor(p / 3),
    "p/2"  = floor(p / 2)
  )

  tryCatch({

    dades_rf <- cbind(X_df, y = y_fac)

    model_rf <- ranger(
      y ~ .,
      data        = dades_rf,
      num.trees   = num.trees,
      mtry        = mtry_val,
      importance  = "permutation",
      num.threads = 1,
      seed        = 123 + j
    )

    imp <- importance(model_rf)

    llindar_val <- switch(llindar,
      "zero"    = 0,
      "mediana" = median(imp),
      "mean_sd" = mean(imp) + sd(imp)
    )

    sel_noms <- names(imp[imp > llindar_val])

    vars_sel <- if (length(sel_noms) == 0) {
      integer(0)
    } else {
      as.integer(sub("V", "", sel_noms))
    }

    metriques(
      vars_seleccionades = vars_sel,
      p  = 0.5,
      nv = num_vars
    )

  }, error = function(e) {

    cat(sprintf("  [WARN ranger] sim %d: %s\n", j, conditionMessage(e)))

    c(sensibilitat = NA, especificitat = NA, VPP = NA,
      VPN = NA, accuracy = NA, net_benefit = NA)
  })
}

# -------------------------------------------------------------
# BUCLE PRINCIPAL
# -------------------------------------------------------------
resultats_llista <- vector("list", nrow(comb) * nrow(hiper))
idx <- 1

temps_total <- system.time({

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N           <- comb$N[i]
    pi          <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i])

    cat("\n====================================\n")
    cat(sprintf(
      "ESCENARI %d/%d (N=%s, pi=%s, cor=%s)\n",
      i, nrow(comb), N, pi, correlation
    ))
    cat("====================================\n")

    for (h in seq_len(nrow(hiper))) {

      nt <- hiper$num.trees[h]
      mt <- hiper$mtry_tipus[h]
      ll <- hiper$llindar[h]

      cat(sprintf(
        "  Hiper %d/%d | trees=%d, mtry=%s, llindar=%s\n",
        h, nrow(hiper), nt, mt, ll
      ))

      temps_hiper <- system.time({

        metr_iter <- lapply(
          1:iters,
          una_iteracio_50,
          X_esc      = X[[i]],
          Y_esc      = Y[[i]],
          num_vars   = num_vars,
          num_sig    = num_sig,
          num.trees  = nt,
          mtry_tipus = mt,
          llindar    = ll
        ) |>
          progressify() |>
          futurize(seed = 123)

      })

      metr_mat <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, metr_iter))

      resultats_llista[[idx]] <- data.frame(
        N             = N,
        pi            = pi,
        correlation   = correlation,
        num.trees     = nt,
        mtry_tipus    = mt,
        llindar       = ll,
        sensibilitat  = mean(metr_mat$sensibilitat,  na.rm = TRUE),
        especificitat = mean(metr_mat$especificitat, na.rm = TRUE),
        VPP           = mean(metr_mat$VPP,           na.rm = TRUE),
        VPN           = mean(metr_mat$VPN,           na.rm = TRUE),
        accuracy      = mean(metr_mat$accuracy,      na.rm = TRUE),
        net_benefit   = mean(metr_mat$net_benefit,   na.rm = TRUE),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )

      cat(sprintf(
        "  Sens=%.3f | Espec=%.3f | VPP=%.3f | VPN=%.3f | Acc=%.3f | NB=%.3f | %.1fs\n",
        resultats_llista[[idx]]$sensibilitat,
        resultats_llista[[idx]]$especificitat,
        resultats_llista[[idx]]$VPP,
        resultats_llista[[idx]]$VPN,
        resultats_llista[[idx]]$accuracy,
        resultats_llista[[idx]]$net_benefit,
        temps_hiper["elapsed"]
      ))

      idx <- idx + 1
    }
  }

  resultats_ranger_hiper <- do.call(rbind, resultats_llista)

})

cat("\n====================================\n")
cat(sprintf("Temps total: %.2f minuts\n", temps_total["elapsed"] / 60))
cat("====================================\n\n")

# -------------------------------------------------------------
# GUARDAR RESULTATS
# -------------------------------------------------------------
save(resultats_ranger_hiper,
     file = "resultats_ranger_hiper.RData")

# -------------------------------------------------------------
# ANÀLISI DELS RESULTATS
# -------------------------------------------------------------
resum_hiper <- resultats_ranger_hiper |>
  group_by(num.trees, mtry_tipus, llindar) |>
  summarise(
    sens_mitjana  = round(mean(sensibilitat,  na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    espec_mitjana = round(mean(especificitat, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    acc_mitjana   = round(mean(accuracy,      na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    nb_mitjana    = round(mean(net_benefit,   na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\n--- TOP 5 per SENSIBILITAT ---\n")
resum_hiper |>
  arrange(desc(sens_mitjana)) |>
  slice_head(n = 5) |>
  print()

cat("\n--- TOP 5 per ESPECIFICITAT ---\n")
resum_hiper |>
  arrange(desc(espec_mitjana)) |>
  slice_head(n = 5) |>
  print()

cat("\n--- RESUM COMPLET ---\n")
resum_hiper |>
  arrange(desc(sens_mitjana)) |>
  print(n = Inf)
```
